```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Detect anomalous data spikes, drops, and distribution shifts.
---
Task:
Add anomaly detection checks to data pipelines.
Requirements:
Define features, baselines, alert thresholds, and suppression rules.
Constraints:
Minimize false positives during expected seasonal changes.
Success Criteria:
Meaningful anomalies are detected early with actionable alerts.
```
